0.content:
# 📋 Active Directory — Extended Attributes Audit
Audits changes to extended attributes — what was altered, by whom, and at what time. Uses Directory Service Changes audit events (5136). **Requires**: Advanced Audit Policy → DS Access → Audit Directory Service Changes enabled.

2.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5136")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

4.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5136")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:PerformedBy EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:PerformedByDomain EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'Object DN:\t\t' DATA:ObjectDN EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'Attribute:\t\t' DATA:AttributeName EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'Operation:\t\t' DATA:Operation EOL"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, PerformedBy, ObjectDN, AttributeName, Operation, content
| filterOut contains(PerformedBy, "$")
| sort timestamp desc
| filter PerformedBy != "SYSTEM"
| filterOut contains(content,"dNSTombstoned") OR contains(content,"dnsRecord") OR contains(content,"dnsNode")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:		' LD:AccountMakingChanges EOL
DATA 'DN:	' LD:AffectedObject EOL
DATA 'Class:	' LD:Class EOL
DATA 'LDAP Display Name:	' LD:Attributes EOL
DATA 'Value:	' LD:Value EOL
DATA 'Type:	' LD:AddMoveChangeDelete EOL
"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, AccountMakingChanges, AffectedObject, Class, Attributes, Value, AddMoveChangeDelete
| summarize ChangeCount = count()

6.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5136")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| makeTimeseries count(), time:{timestamp}, interval:5m

8.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5136")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:PerformedBy EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:PerformedByDomain EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'Object DN:\t\t' DATA:ObjectDN EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'Attribute:\t\t' DATA:AttributeName EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'Operation:\t\t' DATA:Operation EOL"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, PerformedBy, ObjectDN, AttributeName, Operation, content
| filterOut contains(PerformedBy, "$")
| sort timestamp desc
| filter PerformedBy != "SYSTEM"
| filterOut contains(content,"dNSTombstoned") OR contains(content,"dnsRecord") OR contains(content,"dnsNode")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:		' LD:AccountMakingChanges EOL
DATA 'DN:	' LD:AffectedObject EOL
DATA 'Class:	' LD:Class EOL
DATA 'LDAP Display Name:	' LD:Attributes EOL
DATA 'Value:	' LD:Value EOL
DATA 'Type:	' LD:AddMoveChangeDelete EOL
"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, AccountMakingChanges, AffectedObject, Class, Attributes, Value, AddMoveChangeDelete

10.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5136")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| fields timestamp, host.name, content
| sort timestamp desc

12.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5136")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:PerformedBy EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:PerformedByDomain EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'Object DN:\t\t' DATA:ObjectDN EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'Attribute:\t\t' DATA:AttributeName EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'Operation:\t\t' DATA:Operation EOL"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, PerformedBy, ObjectDN, AttributeName, Operation, content
| filterOut contains(PerformedBy, "$")
| sort timestamp desc
| filter PerformedBy != "SYSTEM"
| filterOut contains(content,"dNSTombstoned") OR contains(content,"dnsRecord") OR contains(content,"dnsNode")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:		' LD:AccountMakingChanges EOL
DATA 'DN:	' LD:AffectedObject EOL
DATA 'Class:	' LD:Class EOL
DATA 'LDAP Display Name:	' LD:Attributes EOL
DATA 'Value:	' LD:Value EOL
DATA 'Type:	' LD:AddMoveChangeDelete EOL
"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, AccountMakingChanges, AffectedObject, Class, Attributes, Value, AddMoveChangeDelete
| summarize ChangeCount = count(), by:Attributes
| sort ChangeCount desc

14.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5136")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:PerformedBy EOL"""
| filterOut contains(PerformedBy, "$")
| summarize ChangeCount = count(), by:PerformedBy
| sort ChangeCount desc
